evidence_quotes.quote: This is an online multiplayer game.
This game will disconnect on 1 August 2025.
This was not clearly communicated when selling the game.

paragraphs.text: Dear Mr/Ms, Is it possible to protect customers from the removal of games by publishers? I have a personal experience with the game Block N Load. This is an online multiplayer game. This game will disconnect on 1 August 2025. When this happens, I will no longer be able to play the game, because the game works only online. Not without servers that go offline. I will find this very unfortunate, as I bought the game for 12,74 on 1 May 2015 and have fun/good memories. I hoped to be able to play the game now and in the future, but this seems to be limited. This was not clearly communicated when selling the game. Thank you for your understanding.
